svg.title: Closet four memory fragment (apartment four) - categorized + systemized
svg.desc: Looking straight into a tightly framed storage closet that has been organized to a museum-grade grid. The top shelf carries a row of six identical small archival cubes, each with a label tag. The middle shelf carries three identical lidded boxes with larger labels. The bottom shelf carries a small wood drawer cabinet of six labeled drawers in a 2x3 grid, flanked by two folded linen stacks. The floor carries two large lidded storage totes side by side. Every item is in line with the next; every label sits at the same height as its neighbors. The room is softly overlit and nothing animates.
